mapper.select: SELECT lba.id AS accountId, im.company_name AS bankName, lba.account_name AS accountName, lba.balance AS balance, lba.currency AS currency FROM linked_bank_accounts lba JOIN linked_institutions li ON li.id = lba.institution_id JOIN institution_master im ON im.id = li.institution_master_id WHERE lba.user_id = #{userId} AND lba.is_dormant = TRUE AND lba.closed_at IS NULL ORDER BY lba.balance DESC, lba.id ASC

SELECT id AS accountId, balance AS balance, currency AS currency, is_dormant AS isDormant, closed_at AS closedAt, closed_amount AS closedAmount FROM linked_bank_accounts WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND id IN
#{id}
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(lba.balance), 0) FROM linked_bank_accounts lba WHERE lba.user_id = #{userId} AND lba.currency = 'USD' AND lba.account_type = 'DEMAND' AND lba.is_dormant = FALSE
